title: LISTO FAMILY LITERACY PROGRAM - 211info
text: LISTO FAMILY LITERACY PROGRAM MEDFORD LISTO FAMILY LITERACY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program that provides adult English as a Second Language (ESL) instruction and adult basic education for parents. Children participate in the program with their parents by attending developmentally appropriate classes and getting homework help and Spanish reading support. 1001 Beall Lane Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-15 Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 5:30pm-8pm (541) 734-5150 1049 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Registration (541) 734-5150 ext 1049 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Applications available on website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 5:30pm-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at Central High School (the former South Medford High building) Services: Adult Basic Education Adult Basic Education * Hispanic/Latino Community English as a Second Language English as a Second Language * Hispanic/Latino Community Literacy Programs Literacy Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Tutoring Services Tutoring Services * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
